AddressJson.description: The address of a customer, a building or a site

ApartmentJson.description: An apartment inside a building according to WoFIV

BuildingJson.description: A building as part of a property

size.description: Number of chat sessions in the list

CoTenantJson.description: Tenant information in a rental agreement

id.description: Unique identifier of the organization (generated by server)

projectId.description: ID of the project this contractor belongs to

CountryItemJson.description: A country item of a list

CreateQuotationRequestJson.description: A request to create one quotation request per contractor

InboxMessage.description: Represents an enriched issue event stored in a user's inbox

id.description: Unique identifier of this inbox message

eventType.description: Event type, e.g. ISSUE_CREATED, ISSUE_UPDATED, ISSUE_ASSIGNED

link.description: Link to the frontend issue page

read.description: Whether the message has been read

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was created

actorEmail.description: Email of the actor who triggered the event

ownerEmail.description: Email of the owner assigned to the issue

IssueItemJson.description: An issue item with basic information

modifiedAt.description: Last modification timestamp of the issue

priority.$comment: Only available for project issues, not for tenancy issues

assigneeId.description: Unique identifier of the assignee of the issue
assigneeId.$comment: Only available for project issues, not for tenancy issues

reporterId.description: ID of the user who reported this issue

reportedBy.description: Name of the user who reported this issue

first.description: Index of the first element in list of total available entries, starting at 1

OrderAttachmentJson.description: An attachment associated with a quotation request, quotation, or order placement

OrderPlacementJson.description: An order placement created by a manager based on a quotation

quotationId.description: ID of the quotation this order is based on

ordererId.description: ID of the user who placed the order

orderedBy.description: Name of the user who placed the order

status.description: Status of the order placement: PLACED, CONFIRMED, REJECTED, WITHDRAWN

confirmorId.description: ID of the user who confirmed or rejected the order

confirmedBy.description: Name of the user who confirmed or rejected the order

OrganizationEmployeeJson.description: Employee information in context of an organization

id.description: Unique identifier of the employee (generated by server)

name.description: Full name of the employee (retrieved from user profile)

id.description: Unique identifier of the organization (generated by server)

members.description: Members of the organization together with their derived role in this project

OrganizationMemberListJson.description: List of organizations assigned to a project

ProjectItemJson.description: A project item with the user's member role only

id.description: Unique identifier of the project (generated by server)

members.description: Project members (managed separately via members endpoint)

first.description: Index of the first element in projects list of total available entries, starting at 1

size.description: Number of elements in projects list

ProjectMemberJson.description: Project member information in context of a project

id.description: Unique identifier of the project member (generated by server)

name.description: Full name of the project member (retrieved from user profile)

active.description: Active status of the project member (managed by server)

QuotationJson.description: A quotation response submitted by a contractor

requestId.description: ID of the quotation request this quotation responds to

offererId.description: ID of the user who submitted this quotation

offeredBy.description: Name of the user who submitted this quotation

status.description: Status of the quotation: VALID, INVALID, ACCEPTED, REJECTED

validUntil.description: Timestamp until which the quotation is valid

QuotationRequestJson.description: A request for quotation sent to a contractor

initiatorId.description: ID of the user who initiated this request

initiatedBy.description: Name of the user who initiated this request

status.description: Status of the request: REQUESTED, WITHDRAWN, VIEWING_REQUIRED,CONSULTATION_REQUIRED, REJECTED, SUBMITTED

scopeOfWork.description: Scope of work description for the contractor

RentJson.description: Rent information for a rentable unit

RentalAgreementItemJson.description: A rental agreement item with aggregated rent information for list views

id.description: Unique identifier of the rental agreement

tenants.description: List of tenants in this rental agreement

startOfRental.description: Start date of the rental period

endOfRental.description: End date of the rental period

rentalUnits.description: List of rental units in this agreement

basicRent.description: Sum of basic rent from all currently active rents

operatingCostsPrepayment.description: Sum of operating costs prepayment from all currently active rents

heatingCostsPrepayment.description: Sum of heating costs prepayment from all currently active rents

RentalAgreementJson.description: A rental agreement for rentable units

RentalAgreementListJson.description: A list of rental agreements for a project

RentalUnitNodeDataJson.description: Encapsulated data of a project tree node

tenant.description: Name of the tenant associated with this node

RentalUnitTreeNodeJson.description: A tree node representing a project entity

SiteJson.description: A site as part of a property

StorageJson.description: A storage inside a building but with living space according to WoFIV

TenancyJson.description: A read-only rental agreement of a rentable unit from a tenant's perspective

agreementId.description: Unique identifier of the rental agreement

projectTitle.description: Title of the project this rental agreement belongs to

address.description: Address of the building this rental agreement belongs to

tenants.description: List of tenants in this rental agreement

startOfRental.description: Start date of the rental period

endOfRental.description: End date of the rental period

rentalUnits.description: List of rental units in this agreement

basicRent.description: Sum of basic rent from all currently active rents

operatingCostsPrepayment.description: Sum of operating costs prepayment from all currently active rents

heatingCostsPrepayment.description: Sum of heating costs prepayment from all currently active rents

TenancyListJson.description: A list of rental agreements from a tenant's perspective

TenantItemJson.description: A tenant item with rental units and active status for list views

mobilePhoneNumber.description: Mobile phone number of the tenant

businessPhoneNumber.description: Business phone number of the tenant

privatePhoneNumber.description: Private phone number of the tenant

rentalUnits.description: List of all rental units the tenant has ever rented

active.description: Indicates if the tenant has any active rental agreements

TenantJson.description: Tenant information in a rental agreement

TenantListJson.description: A list of tenants for a project
